question: The Prime Minister is appointed by (प्रधानमंत्री की नियुक्ति किसके द्वारा की जाती है?)
explanation: The President appoints the Prime Minister, usually the leader of the majority party in Lok Sabha.

question: The Prime Minister must be a member of (प्रधानमंत्री को सदस्य होना चाहिए)
options: Either House of Parliament (संसद के किसी भी सदन का)
Any State Assembly (किसी भी विधानसभा का)
explanation: The Prime Minister can be a member of either Lok Sabha or Rajya Sabha.
